overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot through the game world of GTA V, gliding low over the water along the Southern Coast near Del Perro Pier during a hazy, warm sunset. The camera moves steadily southward from the pier toward a palm-lined beach, capturing the Los Santos skyline silhouetted against the orange-pink sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront with pier and city skyline

events.description: text overlay 'Del Perro Pier' and 'Southern Coast' appears in lower left corner

agents.ego_description: flying low over the ocean surface along the coastline, moving southward with the pier on the left

entered.detail: large wooden pier structure with multiple levels extending into the water
vertical wooden support pillars in the water reflecting on the surface
calm water surface with pink and orange reflections from the sunset
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers silhouetted against the hazy sky
large roller coaster structure visible in the distance behind the pier
tall industrial or cooling tower structures visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low aerial view of Del Perro Pier extending into the ocean, with the Los Santos skyline and Leviathan roller coaster visible in the hazy distance. The camera drifts smoothly over the reflective water as warm sunset text appears on screen, establishing the location as the Southern Coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach transitioning from pier to palm tree coastline

events.description: beach sand enters the right side of frame as the pier structure moves toward the left edge
palm trees and a modern coastal building become visible on the right shoreline

agents.ego_description: continuing south along the shoreline, transitioning from the pier area to the beachfront with palm trees

entered.detail: sandy shoreline with wet patches reflecting the sunset light
tall palm trees lining the edge of the beach
modern low-rise building with illuminated windows on the beachfront

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the pier to the open beach as the sandy shoreline enters from the right. Palm trees and a modern beachfront building come into view while the pier and its pilings recede behind the camera. The city skyline shifts to the left as the drone continues its smooth southward trajectory.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined beach with modern coastal building

agents.ego_description: gliding along the sandy beach past leaning palm trees and the modern building, maintaining a low altitude over the shoreline

entered.detail: tall floodlight poles with multiple lamps illuminating the beach area

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the sandy beach and palm tree line, with the coastal building now prominent on the right. The city skyline has faded into the hazy distance behind the camera, leaving the beach, palm trees, and the modern structure as the primary elements. The camera maintains its smooth low-altitude drift along the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous low-altitude aerial glide that transitions from the industrial structures of a coastal pier to a serene, palm-lined beachfront. It begins by drifting over reflective ocean waters with the Del Perro Pier and the distant Los Santos skyline silhouetted against a hazy sunset. As the camera maintains its smooth southward trajectory, the sandy shoreline and a modern beachfront building emerge from the right while the pier's pilings recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as the city skyline slides further to the left and fades into the haze, leaving the focus on the rhythmic line of palm trees. Finally, the camera settles into a steady drift along the water's edge, framed by the prominent coastal architecture and the golden light of the evening.
